entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Groundnut (Arachis hypogaea L.), the crop studied for disease resistance and pod weight

entities.name: EARLY LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A disease caused by Cercospora arachidicola S. Hori that affects groundnut production

entities.name: CERCOSPORA ARACHIDICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing early leaf spot in groundnut

entities.name: ELS RESISTANCE
entities.description: The trait of being resistant to early leaf spot disease in groundnut

entities.name: POD WEIGHT
entities.description: A phenotypic trait measuring the weight of groundnut pods

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding methods used to develop resistant groundnut varieties

entities.name: MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: Statistical associations between genetic markers and specific phenotypic traits

entities.name: DARTSEQ
entities.description: Diversity array technology used for high-throughput genotyping of groundnut accessions

entities.name: SILICO DART MARKERS
entities.description: Dominant markers generated through the DArTseq process

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Biallelic single nucleotide polymorphism markers used for genome-wide detection

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The measure of the proportion of phenotypic variation attributable to genetic factors for ELS and pod weight

entities.name: CHROMOSOME B04
entities.description: A specific chromosome in the groundnut genome with a high density of markers

entities.name: CHROMOSOME A04
entities.description: A specific chromosome in the groundnut genome with a high density of markers

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using genetic markers to select for desired traits like ELS resistance

entities.name: TRAIT INTROGRESSION
entities.description: The process of incorporating a specific trait from one genetic background into another
